videos.title: HTML Button Tag Tutorial
videos.author: Web Dev Simplified
videos.description: Complete overview of the HTML button element — types, attributes, form integration, and styling.

videos.title: Styling HTML Buttons Like a Pro
videos.author: Kevin Powell
videos.description: Kevin Powell demonstrates CSS techniques for beautiful, accessible buttons including hover effects, transitions, and responsive sizing.

videos.title: Accessible Buttons — A11y Tips
videos.author: A11y with Nick
videos.description: Deep dive into button accessibility — ARIA roles, keyboard navigation, focus management, and screen reader behavior.

videos.title: Form Buttons and the Popover API
videos.author: Fireship
videos.description: Modern HTML button features including the Popover API, form overrides, and invoker commands.

videos.title: CSS Button Animations Masterclass
videos.author: Online Tutorials
videos.description: Creative CSS animations for buttons — hover effects, ripple, glow, loading spinners, and micro-interactions.
